dct_title_s: New York City 1 Foot Digital Elevation Model, 2010
dct_creator_sm: New York (N.Y.). Department of Information Technology and Telecommunications.
dct_description_sm: New York City 1 Foot Digital Elevation Model, 2010 is a raster theme representing elevation in new york city at a resolution if 1 foot as of 2010. This DEM was derived from LiDAR point data and provided by the NYC Office of Technology and Innovation (OTI). This data was accessed from the NYC Open Data Portal (https://data.cityofnewyork.us/City-Government/1-foot-Digital-Elevation-Model-DEM-/dpc8-z3jc/about_data). Columbia University libraries staff converted this data to the TIFF format. Further documentation from OTI included with the download package in markdown format.
dct_publisher_sm: New York (N.Y.). Department of Information Technology and Telecommunications.
dct_rightsHolder_sm: New York (N.Y.). Department of Information Technology and Telecommunications.
